user.title: Connect to GridRadar
user.description: Enter your GridRadar server URL and an API key created under Settings → API. The key needs the scopes: control:chargepoints, read:chargepoints, read:sessions.

data_description.api_key: Paste the gr_… key. It is stored encrypted and never shown again.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter GridRadar API key
reauth_confirm.description: The stored API key was rejected. Paste a new key to reconnect.

error.invalid_host: That doesn't look like a valid http(s) URL.
error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected (401/403). Check the key and its scopes.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the GridRadar server. Check the URL and network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This GridRadar server is already configured.

remote_start.name: Remote start
remote_start.description: Authorize/start a charge on a GridRadar chargepoint.

id_tag.name: idTag
id_tag.description: RFID / auth tag the charger accepts.

remote_stop.name: Remote stop
remote_stop.description: Stop the active session (or a specific transaction).

transaction_id.name: Transaction ID
transaction_id.description: OCPP transaction id. Omit to stop the active session.

request_status.name: Request status
request_status.description: Trigger an OCPP StatusNotification so connector status/availability are refreshed.

connector_id.name: Connector
connector_id.description: Connector to refresh. Omit for all connectors.
